title: lepidium subalpinum
intro: Lepidium subalpinum, also known as alpine pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its annual growth habit and small, white or pink flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis and improve overall well-being. Lepidium subalpinum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption.
